chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 2507 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For katcha Peshi 3. For hearing of MA No 9302/2017 01.02.2018. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari A.P.G a/w DSP G.Qadir Shaikh & Inspector Nadeem Chanar SHO P.S.Jam Datar Shaheed Benazirabad -=-=- This is second call. None is present on behalf of the petitioner, no intimation is received. It is now 12.15 am. Since none is present on behalf of the petitioner, therefore, we ourselves have gone through the memo of petition as well as prayer clause of the petition. From the perusal of case file it appears that FIR No.47/2017 lodged at police station Jam Datar U/s 353, 147,148 PPC. Learned AAG and APG submit that the FIRs mentioned in the prayer clause have already been challaned in the competent court of law and the trial court have already taken the cognizance, therefore, this petition is not maintainable. In view of above, this petition stands dismissed alongwith listed applications, however, the official respondents are directed to make sure that there should not be caused any harassment to the petitioner in violation of the law. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
